inputs.label: Target Dive Depth
inputs.businessContext: Planned maximum depth of the dive, affecting inert gas loading and decompression risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Planned maximum depth of the dive, affecting inert gas loading and decompression risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalışın planlanan maksimum derinliği, inert gaz yüklenmesini ve dekompresyon riskini etkiler.

inputs.label: Target Partial Pressure O₂
inputs.businessContext: Safe maximum partial pressure of oxygen to avoid CNS toxicity (1.4–1.6 atm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Safe maximum partial pressure of oxygen to avoid CNS toxicity (1.4–1.6 atm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: CNS toksisitesini önlemek için güvenli maksimum kısmi oksijen basıncı (1.4–1.6 atm).

inputs.label: Nitrox O₂ Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Oxygen percentage in the breathing gas mix, determines depth limits and decompression efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Oxygen percentage in the breathing gas mix, determines depth limits and decompression efficiency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Solunum gazı karışımındaki oksijen yüzdesi, derinlik limitlerini ve dekompresyon verimliliğini belirler.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
